summary: Verified build-android-apk.sh Step 3 preflight fix. Extracted preflight bash block, ran it against broken URL (perkworth.app → 404) and healthy URL (orbit-vouchers preview → 200). Both assertions pass: broken URL aborts with 'Preflight FAILED', 'Network error', and 'set VITE_BACKEND_URL' guidance + non-zero exit; healthy URL prints 'Backend reachable → /api/health returned 200' + exit 0. Backend /api/health on localhost:8001 returns 200 with {status:'ok', db:'up'}. Backend pytest regression: 210 passed, 2 skipped (unchanged from iter 23).
critical_code_review_comments: Preflight uses curl -sL with --max-time 10 which is reasonable; if the URL is a redirect chain to a static site (perkworth.app returns 404 after redirect), HEALTH_CODE correctly reflects the final status.
Default fallback for BACKEND_URL is still https://perkworth.app — this is intentional so unset env vars trigger the preflight-abort with clear guidance, which is the exact desired UX. Good.
Minor: the preflight response body is saved to /tmp/perkworth-health.txt but never read/asserted on. Consider also validating body contains 'status' or db:'up' for extra safety, but not blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preflight fix verified in isolation because full script requires JDK 17 + Android SDK (not present in container) — script dies at Step 1 'Java not installed' before reaching Step 3. Task note explicitly permits this approach. /app/test_reports/test_preflight.sh runs the extracted Step 3 preflight block against both URLs and can be re-used as regression.
rca of the issue: User's APK showed 'Network error' because it was built with the default BACKEND_URL=https://perkworth.app which is a Vercel static site — /api/health returns 404, so all API calls from the mobile WebView fail. Fix (verified): Step 3 of build script now curls $BACKEND_URL/api/health up-front; if HTTP status != 200, die() aborts with actionable message telling user to set VITE_BACKEND_URL to a working backend (e.g., preview URL). This prevents shipping a broken APK. User can unblock immediately with: VITE_BACKEND_URL=https://orbit-vouchers.preview.emergentagent.com bash scripts/build-android-apk.sh
